rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MARILYN ANN MALLEN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF HAROLD F. POHL
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
rulings.Rulings: Matter to be continued to 9/23/2025. The following issues to be cleared two weeks before the hearing date: (1) The petition must clarify whether a personal representative (PR) has been appointed for the deceased sole devisee, Charles F. Pohl. While the petition lists Charles F. Pohl's issues, it does not indicate whether there has been or will be a probate proceeding for his estate. (2) Additionally, the petition should address the attorney's conflicting interest in representing both the deceased PR and the successor PR. (3) Based on the clarification provided above, Waiver of Bond By Heir of Beneficiary [Form DE-142] must be filed. The decedent's Will did not name the petitioner as the executor, which means the Will does not waive the bond requirement for the petitioner. (4) In the caption and point #3, it should specify that the administrator with the will annexed is the petitioner, as the petitioner is not designated to act. (5) Duties and Liabilities of Personal Representative [Form DE-147] (6) Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number [Form DE-147S] to be separately filed. See the Local Rule of SF 14.18.E and 14.59.C. (7) A new proposed order to be submitted. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF GUO CHEN PENG
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 9/17/2025. The following issues to be cleared two weeks before the hearing date: (1) Need a written nomination from the sole heir, the decedent's mother, pursuant to Prob. Code sections 8461 and 8462. Otherwise, proper notice must be given to the Public Administrator's Office. (2) The minimum bond of $20,000 will be required for a non-CA resident personal rep. Local Rule 14.16.E. A verified supplement seeking the minimum bond needs to be filed. (3) Also, the proposed order is to be resubmitted with the minimum bond.
